prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为12178→14921→13965→13703→14083，近五年整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约14083名；2021–2025年物理 类计划数分别为80→86→90→89→89人，2026年计划91人，较2025年小幅扩招2人，扩招幅度约2.2%，对竞争略有缓解但影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第65名持续上升至2026年第52名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2023年高考周期内曾出现偏负面舆情（学校管理相 关），但2026年声誉文件中无新增负面信号；抖音热度排名第71位（一般），短视频平台曝光量中等，未见明显报考热度异常；食品科学与工程A+、轻工技术与 工程A+，均为全国顶尖水平，与该校物理类招生的食品科学与工程、轻化工程等专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通 信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校物理类主力招生专业高度重合，推高报考热度；福建省2026年物理类考生估算约20.4万人，较2025年增长约6%，竞争加 剧，近年波动不大；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属长三角经济发达地区，对福建考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在福 建招生规模稳定（物理类80–91人），属外省招生较多的211院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年小幅扩招（+2人）、软科排名持续上升（第52名）、优势学科（食品A+/轻工A +）对相关专业报考的拉动、福建省物理类考生增长约6%带来的竞争加剧，以及工科热门专业（计算机/电子/电气）高热趋势，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年14083名基础上小 幅后移；预测最低位次约14303名，区间13803–14803名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 12178 → 14921 → 13965 → 13703 → 14083 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend in the past five years, with a baseline of approximately 14083 in 2025; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 80 → 86 → 90 → 89 → 89, with a planned 91 students in 2026, a slight expansion of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 2.2%, which slightly eases competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was some negative public opinion (related to school management), but no new negative signals in the 2026 reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking 71st (average), short video platform exposure moderate, no obvious abnormal application heat; Food Science and Engineering A+, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, both at the national top level, directly corresponding to the university's Physics Category enrollment majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Light Chemical Engineering, strongly attracting related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with the university's main Physics Category enrollment majors, driving up application heat; Fujian Province's estimated Physics Category candidates in 2026 are about 204,000, an increase of about 6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition, with little fluctuation in recent years; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, part of the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, strongly attractive to Fujian candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Fujian is stable (80–91 students in Physics Category), making it one of the 211 universities with relatively large enrollment from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight expansion in 2026 (+2 students), continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (52nd), the pull of advantageous disciplines (Food A+/Light Industry A+) on related major applications, intensified competition due to about 6% increase in Fujian Physics Category candidates, and the high heat of popular engineering majors (Computer/Electronics/Electrical), the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 14083; predicted minimum ranking approximately 14303, with a range of 13803–14803.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13803–14803, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Automation, Electrical, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Textile Engineering, Light Chemical Engineering, etc.) as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 13803), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (around 14803), prioritize Tier 3 safety options while considering Tier 2 mid-level majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 2017 → 2323 → 1994 → 1982 → 2250 respectively, showing significant fluctuations in recent five years without a clear unilateral trend, with a baseline of approximately 2250 in 2025; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 18 → 21 → 22 → 20 → 19, with a planned enrollment of 20 in 2026, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 5.3%, slightly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with a continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was some negative public opinion (related to university management), but no new negative signals in the 2026 reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), with moderate exposure on short video platforms; Food Science and Engineering is A+, Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, both at the national top level, but the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Accounting, etc.) have low correlation with these advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Accounting ranges from cautious to recommended, overall stable; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Fujian Province in 2026 is about 64,000, an increase of about 6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition, with little fluctuation in recent years; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, part of the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong regional appeal to Fujian examinees; the university's enrollment scale in Fujian for History Category is relatively small (18–20 people), leading to concentrated competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+1 person), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, the intensified competition due to an approximately 6% increase in Fujian History Category examinees, and the overall stable popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 2250; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2336, with a range of 1916–2756.
